channel.title: Pigsty – Category: ETL
channel.description: Recent content in Category: ETL on Pigsty

item.title: Docs: pglogical
item.description:
Overview

PGDG 1st Party Extension: pglogical : PostgreSQL Logical Replication

Information

  • ID: 9500
  • Name: pglogical
  • Alias: pglogical
  • Category: ETL
  • Website: https://github.com/2ndQuadrant/pglogical
  • License: PostgreSQL License
  • Language: Unknown
  • Tags: N/A
  • Comment: 无

Metadata

  • Version: 2.4.4
  • PG Vers: 17,16,15,14,13,12
  • Need Load: Lib Loading NOT Required
  • Need DDL: DO CREATE EXTENSION DDL
  • Relocatable: Relocatable
  • Trusted: Untrusted, Require Superuser to Create
  • Schemas: pglogical
  • Requires: N/A

Packages

  • RPM Repo: PGDG
  • RPM Name: pglogical_$v*
  • RPM Ver : 2.4.4
  • RPM Deps: Nil
  • DEB Repo: PGDG
  • DEB Name: postgresql-$v-pglogical*
  • DEB Ver : 2.4.5
  • DEB Deps: Nil

Details

item.title: Docs: pgl_ddl_deploy
item.description:
